goals.title: Implement the full Hydrogen Peroxide / hype plan in .omo/plans/hydrog...
goals.objective: Implement the full Hydrogen Peroxide / hype plan in .omo/plans/hydrogen-peroxide-hype.md, reduce measured gaps versus the plan, verify with TDD and manual tmux QA, then commit well and push to origin/main only after all required implementation gaps are closed.

successCriteria.scenario: tmux happy-path CLI scenario: create .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/final-happy-data, run hype doctor, source chats, sync, index --dry-run, index --json, search keyword, search bm25, search semantic with mock/local mode, chunk get, wipe-index; PASS iff transcript contains Hydrogen Peroxide, inserted_messages, chunk ids, parent_chunk_ids, and semantic_removed true
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C001-final-happy.txt | rerun after reviewer blocker fixes; cleanup: tmux kill-session -t ulw-qa-C001; confirmed tmux has-session exit=1

successCriteria.scenario: tmux edge/adversarial scenario: run malformed fixture sync, empty BM25 query, unknown chunk get, unsupported kakaocli source, semantic search before index, and repeated sync idempotency; PASS iff transcript shows structured non-zero errors without raw private path/key leakage and second sync inserted_messages=0
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C002-final-edge.txt | rerun after reviewer blocker fixes; cleanup: tmux kill-session -t ulw-qa-C002; confirmed tmux has-session exit=1; missing-kakaocli check used built ./target/debug/hype with restricted PATH; privacy_leak=absent

successCriteria.scenario: tmux regression and quality-gate scenario: run cargo fmt --check, cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy -D warnings, rg privacy/source-ignore audit, git status --ignored, and no leftover ulw tmux sessions; PASS iff all commands exit 0 and source files are not ignored while generated stores are ignored
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/C003-final-regression.txt | rerun after reviewer blocker fixes; cleanup: tmux kill-session -t ulw-qa-C003; confirmed tmux has-session exit=1; fmt/build/test/clippy all exit=0; LOC<=250; generated archive ignored; source and ledger not ignored; privacy audit manual=pass

goals.blockedReason: Implementation, criteria, cargo gates, and final reviewer passed, but final complete checkpoint is blocked because get_goal returns a different completed legacy planning objective in this thread; cannot create/update matching ULW aggregate Codex goal here.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e97f8-a94f-7ea3-9f92-60e53f4f6ff6/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e97f8-a94f-7ea3-9f92-60e53f4f6ff6/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
